name: herdres
description: Operate the Herdr-to-Telegram bridge: per-agent topics, send/interrupt/queue, status, managed bots, cockpit, maintenance.

interface.longDescription: Install and operate the Herdr-to-Telegram bridge: set up per-agent forum topics, send/interrupt/queue messages to agent panes, read status and reports, manage child bots, drive the macOS cockpit, and run maintenance.
defaultPrompt: Set up herdres so I can control my Herdr agents from Telegram.
